series_metadata.series_description: Files that document workplace injuries for purposes of providing compensation. Can include medical documentation, claims, accident reports, payout documentation, First Report of Injury reports, and communication between AGO, Bureau of Workers'' Compensation, employees, and medical providers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years from last activity on claim or until there is a full and final settlement, whichever is later, Paper: Shred
